question: Which of the following describes a power state instead of a power mode? (Select TWO.)
explanation: On (S0) and Off (S5/G3) are definitive power states. Sleep (S3) and Hibernation (S4) are also states, but 'On' and 'Off' are the most fundamental states of a machine being powered or unpowered.

question: Which of the following scenarios will work in Windows in regard to multiple monitors? (Select TWO.)

choices.A: Windows supports multiple video cards with one or more monitors attached
choices.B: Windows does not support multiple monitors, only multiple desktops
choices.C: Windows can handle monitors of different resolution attached to the same system
choices.D: Windows supports up to two monitors on a single video card

explanation: Modern Windows versions can easily handle multiple video cards and can extend the desktop across monitors with different native resolutions.

question: Which of the following options fall under I.T. best practices? (Select TWO.)

choices.A: Offering all possible choices to a customer
choices.B: Dress appropriately with clients and customers
choices.C: Always suggesting the least expensive option.
choices.D: Following up with a customer to verify satisfaction.

explanation: Professionalism in I.T. includes maintaining a professional appearance and ensuring customer satisfaction by following up after a service call.
